title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Judge, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even if you shoot them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The bullets aren't work- ing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is up with these guys!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fire! Fire!!! Bring over the Bazooka!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...sanji, take that wounded guy and leave the island already... you're in the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, the stories of these guys being cybors with metal skin were all true....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did you bastards survive!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nuestorte's ten thousand soldier Army should've crushed your kingdom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a great time to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We won't forgive the ones...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who tricked us!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This island is Germa 66's prey, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Oh, those guys. A swarm of flies did come, but we threw them all into the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...even if our scientific power had been stolen, what could a bunch of idiots do with it anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Brother Nusstorte!! Baskartte!! Dosmarche!! Please respond, big brothers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's as I thought... ever since Pekoms' betrayal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: silence...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: unbe- Lievable things have been happen- ing-vous plait!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: We were told that Germa was subjugated...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So... Why did their fleet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: appear at CACAO Island- Soooilir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 12th son of the Charlotte Family Nusstorte

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fireeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be distracted by Germa's fleet!! Our focus is the straw hats' ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell the whole fleet to surround the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, m'am!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mont D'Or and the others... it looks like they were out- Smarted by Germa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were as well, weren't you...? big brother daifuku.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...that's why I've caught back up!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: What do you think about Germa's appearance!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are they enemies? Or are they allies!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think they'd come here just to claim our heads when they could've gotten away already!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They helped us once before, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Putting trust in them now is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Bururu Ruru!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kachak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Jinbe, can you hear me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SANJ!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pass straight through the port at full speed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll definitely return to the ship in that time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's go, jinbe!! to starboard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't let black leg get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone's spreading out!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: crush German AAAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where are they!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GWAA AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't see them because of all the dust!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
